nasb.text: If I had said, “I will speak thus,” Behold, I would have betrayed the generation of Your children.

esv.text: If I had said, “I will speak thus,” I would have betrayed the generation of your children.

cnv.text: 如果我心裡說：“我要說這樣的話”， 我就是對你這一代的眾兒女不忠了。

ccb.text: 要是我这样说， 我就是背叛了你的子民。

csbs.text: 如果我这样说话， 就是对你这一代的儿女背信了。
